/* CAF */ not "the FIFA" in English and other copy edits, and tag

/* CAF */In my own opinion this seems to be again a try to minimize the value of the Moroccan dossier. The Wikipedia references given in the text are full of external references regarding security, Tourism and finance. Additionally if the bid dossier haven’t fulfilled the FIFA requirements the outcome should be less than 2 in total. 
Regarding travel time, the local time and the distance to a large number of the european cities, every one can easily come to this result, it doesn’t need any re...

/* CAF */The Wikipedia articles and the outcome of the task force are the references. 2,7 from 5 point mean requirements fullfiled.
In the last comments there is more information.

/* CAF */This is for me a propaganda for the North American bid. To be fair and neutral without disinformation add the following references in the North American bid section.

https://www.forbes.com/sites/bobbymcmahon/2017/04/09/usa-mexico-canada-bid-for-2026-world-cup-finals-may-seem-a-shoo-in-but-here-are-seven-big-problems/#7ab6ece032d3

https://edition.cnn.com/2018/06/07/football/hope-solo-2026-world-cup-bid-us-canada-mexico-morocco-us-soccer-spt-intl/index.html

There exist  other refere...
